chat.disclaimer: RoboDoc can make mistakes. Check important info.

bot.initial1: Hello! I'm RoboDoc, your AI health assistant.
bot.initial2: Type "start" to begin your symptom analysis.
bot.askMainSymptom: Describe your main symptom (e.g., fever, cough, headache)
bot.askDays: How many days have you had these symptoms?
bot.letMeCheck: Let me check that for you...
bot.fetchError: Sorry, I couldn't fetch an answer right now.
bot.hello: Hello! How can I help you today?
bot.doingGreat: I'm doing great! How can I assist you?
bot.freeChat: You can chat with me freely, or type "start" to begin a symptom diagnosis.
bot.medicalDetected:
It looks like you're talking about a medical condition.

👉 Do you want to chat normally or start a full diagnosis?
Type chat or diagnose.
bot.confirmChat: Sure! You can chat with me freely now.
bot.confirmDiagnose: Great! Let's continue. How old are you?
bot.didNotUnderstand: I didn't understand that. Type "start" to begin diagnosis or ask your question.
bot.diagnosisFailed: Sorry, analysis failed. Please try again or consult a doctor.
bot.restHydrate: Rest, stay hydrated, and monitor symptoms.

modal.title: Medical Analysis Report
modal.name: Name
modal.highSeverityMsg: This condition requires immediate medical attention. Please consult a healthcare professional as soon as possible.
modal.disclaimer: This is an AI-assisted preliminary analysis and should NOT replace professional medical advice. Always consult qualified healthcare providers for accurate diagnosis and treatment.
